results.title: MemAI alternatives? : r/PKMS
results.content: I liked the way the app "philosophy": write a note with your thoughts, and we'll do the organizing for you. And I found the AI chat so useful in gaining a bigger understanding of myself and my business, especially for being able to ask the IA things like:. I see it like a "thinking assistant", or something like that... Maybe I'm afraid of possible technical vulnerabilities and my content being exposed, but I'm not sure that's the main reason I want to try another thing. *   Image 6: Add offline VAD, ASR and more with native SDKs. Image 7: u/mazdausa avataru/mazdausa•Promoted. Sounds like you're in an exploratory phase so I'll just throw you a few alternatives that I've collected that have the 'thinking assistant' feature you're after:. If privacy is the main issue here I'd recommend something like Obsidian (or any other local & offline) note taking app that can be used with local LLM's.

results.title: MeMi Message SMS & AI Bot Chat - Apps on Google Play
results.content: ## About this app. MeMiMessage permite que você crie conversas de chat simuladas realistas e compartilhe-as com seus amigos. Crie contatos e conversas MeMiMessage e divirta-se com seus amigos e familiares. MeMiMessage é um aplicativo de SMS e MMS que também permite criar e interpretar conversas de mensagens de bate-papo localmente ou com amigos. Crie histórias de texto e converse com fanfics como personagens em qualquer ambiente. Este é o melhor aplicativo da Play Store para autores de fanfics e conversas de mensagens de texto do Universo Alternativo (AU). Faça conversas de bate-papo falso para brincar com amigos. Com dezenas de opções e recursos ilimitados, este aplicativo permite que você use sua criatividade e crie histórias de bate-papo divertidas e emocionantes. The developer provided this information and may update it over time. This app may collect these data types. In my short experience with the app, it seems like a great fake messaging app. thank you, it's a great app for my AUs!
